question: Shimabukuro vs. Tomic: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Sho Shimabukuro and Bernard Tomic in the Dallas Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP statistics.
groupItemTitle: Dallas Open, Qualification: Sho Shimabukuro vs Bernard Tomic Total Sets: O/U 2.5

events.title: Dallas Open, Qualification: Sho Shimabukuro vs Bernard Tomic
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Sho Shimabukuro and Bernard Tomic in the Dallas Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 8 at 2:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Shimabukuro' if Sho Shimabukuro advances against Bernard Tomic.

This market will resolve to 'Tomic' if Bernard Tomic advances against Sho Shimabukuro.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set 1 Winner: Shimabukuro vs Tomic
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Sho Shimabukuro and Bernard Tomic in the Dallas Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 8 2026.

This market refers to the tennis match between Liudmila Samsonova and Magdalena Frech in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.

events.description:

question: Total Kills Over/Under 34.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between Disguised and LYON in the LCS Lock In Group Stage, scheduled for February 7 at 7:00PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 35 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 9, 8PM ET
description:
